Name: Run external headers/TLS scan
Notes: Run securityheaders.com and SSL Labs, record findings and remediation actions.

Name: Auth and role enforcement review
Notes: Verify protected routes reject unauthenticated users and wrong roles with safe status codes.

Name: Admin route authorization audit
Notes: Confirm all admin routes are restricted and consistently enforce admin checks.

Name: Input validation fuzz pass
Notes: Send malformed JSON, bad types, and oversized payloads to writable endpoints and verify safe errors.

Name: Rate limit verification pass
Notes: Exercise high-risk endpoints and verify throttling, 429 responses, and retry headers.

Name: CORS allowlist validation
Notes: Verify allowed origins pass and unknown origins are rejected in production.

Name: IDOR access control checks
Notes: Attempt cross-stable resource access/update/delete and verify denials.

Name: File upload safety checks
Notes: Validate mime/type/size restrictions and verify no script execution via uploaded content.

Name: Secrets exposure sweep
Notes: Check repo/docs/logs for leaked keys and rotate anything exposed.

Name: Dependency vulnerability triage
Notes: Run npm audit and triage critical/high vulnerabilities with issues created for fixes.

Name: Dependabot and code scanning review
Notes: Review GitHub security alerts and create remediation tasks for valid findings.

Name: Sentry alert pipeline validation
Notes: Trigger test errors and verify issue ingestion plus alert delivery channels.

Name: Security runbook freshness check
Notes: Confirm incident/rollback runbook is current and owners are assigned.

Name: Launch security sign-off
Notes: Document final security sign-off with evidence links and outstanding accepted risks.
